TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Taypak 101 ŚŹįŚĆó101 Taypak 101 "kamu nu Ing, TAIPEI101" tini i Taywan Taypak kuwan sin-i kitizaan u satalakaway a luma', mala u angangan nu nipatinengan a luma' 508 a depah, 101 ku talakaw, 5 ku katadungduh nu sasaay, sipatizeng aca tu pipacakayan "TAIPEI101MALL". i 2004 a mihca 12 a bulad 31 a demiad miteka katukuh 2010 a mihca 1 a bulad 4 a demiad u CTBUH a nipatatengaan u saayaway talakaway a luma' nu kitakit, ŚŹįŚĆó101(ŤčĪŤ™ě:TAIPEI 101) "TAIPEI 101 MALL".śĖľ2004ŚĻī12śúą31 CTBUH nilaculan imahini u saayaway nu talakaway a luma' nu Taywan, atu uyni dada' satalakaway macaliway ku 500 depah, macaliway ku 100 katatungduh a nipatizeng a luma', caay ku saayaway a talakaway dada' nu kitakit macaliway ku pangkiw kung-li "pakala tu 0.3 ing-li ku nipatizeng, u saka11 nu satalakaway a nipatizeng nu kitakit. u nipatizeng atu misiwbay a sakaput u nu Taypak cin-lung a kusi. Taypak ŚŹįŚĆó101 a nisabalucu'an patizeng namakay 1990 a mihcaan malingatu pacakat, saayaway a ngangan "Taypak kanatal cin-lung a kitizaan" "kamu nu Ing Taipei World Financial Center han" han, apatatungus tu Cung-hwa-min-kow seybu micuzuhay tu Ya-tay pisiwbayan a kitizaan" milekakawa misabalucu' pasayza cin-lung-ye misanga' tu tabakiay a patiyamayay, ŚŹįŚĆó101 "(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Taipei World Financial Center), , zikuz paketun i Taypak kuwan sin-i sabalucu'an a kitizaan A22 atu A23 a kitizaan patizeng, tini satu i 1996 a mihca 10 a bulad pabalucu' u mahiniay NOT ku nipatizeng. 1997 a mihca 7 a bulad, Taypak kanatal cin-lunng kitizaan patizing i Cung-hwa milungan, hung-kuw patizegay u ci-ye ku mikeliday Taywan u kalisiw 206 walwalen 70 a mihcaan ku situngus tuyni a lala' zikuz, patizeng tu Taypak cin-lung a kusi mala u mikawaway a sakaput, i 1998 a mihca 1 bulad 13 a demiad tatenga'ay tu miteka mikawaw. katukuh 1999 a mihca 4 a bulad, u Lipun nu misiwbayay syung-ku kaput ku saayaway KTRT a sakaput nu Taywan a kalisiw 391 walwalen ku nibawan apakala ku ta-luw patizengay, uyni a mihca 7 a bulad tateng'ay tu miteka ku ta-low mikawaway. 2001 a mihca 6 a bulad atu 2003 a mihca 7 a bulad pasazuma malepun ku pipacakayan atu pamuya a misalisin, zikuz i 2002 a mihca 7 a bulad nipatizengan nu ayzaay a ngangan, kilul ta-luw i 2003 a mkihca 10 a bulad malepun ku tukun, sipatizeng tu picakayay a kitizaan i 2003 a mihca 11 a bulad mibuhat, sazikuzay ta-luw mikawaway i 2004 a mihcaan hamin malepun zikuz uyni sazikuzay a mihca mibuhat šł≠śĖáŚŹįŚĆó 101
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == tajpak *** ***** tajpak *** "kamu nu iŇč, taip…ôi***" tini i tajwan tajpak kuwan sin-i kitizaan u satar~…ĺakawaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, mar~…ĺa u aŇčaŇčan nu nipatin…ôŇčan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° *** a d…ôpańß, *** ku tar~…ĺakaw, * ku kataduŇčduńß nu sasaaj, sipatiz…ôŇč a ¶a tu pipa ¶akajan "taip…ôi***mar~…ĺr~…ĺ". i **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mit…ôka katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad u ¶tbuńß a nipatat…ôŇčaan u saajawaj tar~…ĺakawaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu kitakit, *****(**:taip…ôi ***) "taip…ôi *** mar~…ĺr~…ĺ".*********** ¶tbuńß nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan imańßini u saajawaj nu tar~…ĺakawaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu tajwan, atu ujni dada Ē~ ° satar~…ĺakawaj ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj ku *** d…ôpańß, ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj ku *** katatuŇčduńß a nipatiz…ôŇč a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, ¶aaj ku saajawaj a tar~…ĺakawaj dada Ē~ ° nu kitakit ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj ku paŇčkiw kuŇč-r~…ĺi "pakar~…ĺa tu *.* iŇč-r~…ĺi ku nipatiz…ôŇč, u saka** nu satar~…ĺakawaj a nipatiz…ôŇč nu kitakit. u nipatiz…ôŇč atu misiwbaj a sakaput u nu tajpak ¶in-r~…ĺuŇč a kusi. tajpak ***** a nisabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an patiz…ôŇč namakaj **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu pa ¶akat, saajawaj a ŇčaŇčan "tajpak kanatar~…ĺ ¶in-r~…ĺuŇč a kitizaan" "kamu nu iŇč taip…ôi worr~…ĺd finan ¶iar~…ĺ ¶…ônt…ôr ńßan" ńßan, apatatuŇčus tu ¶uŇč-ńßwa-min-kow s…ôbu mi ¶uzuńßaj tu ja-taj pisiwbajan a kitizaan" mir~…ĺ…ôkakawa misabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° pasajza ¶in-r~…ĺuŇč-j…ô misaŇča Ē~ ° tu tabakiaj a patijamajaj, ***** "(**:taip…ôi worr~…ĺd finan ¶iar~…ĺ ¶…ônt…ôr), , zikuz pak…ôtun i tajpak kuwan sin-i sabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an a kitizaan a** atu a** a kitizaan patiz…ôŇč, tini satu i **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° u mańßiniaj not ku nipatiz…ôŇč. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad, tajpak kanatar~…ĺ ¶in-r~…ĺunŇč kitizaan patiziŇč i ¶uŇč-ńßwa mir~…ĺuŇčan, ńßuŇč-kuw patiz…ôgaj u ¶i-j…ô ku mik…ôr~…ĺidaj tajwan u kar~…ĺisiw *** war~…ĺwar~…ĺ…ôn ** a mińß ¶aan ku situŇčus tujni a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° zikuz, patiz…ôŇč tu tajpak ¶in-r~…ĺuŇč a kusi mar~…ĺa u mikawawaj a sakaput, i **** a mińß ¶a * bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj tu mit…ôka mikawaw. katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad, u r~…ĺipun nu misiwbajaj sjuŇč-ku kaput ku saajawaj kt*t a sakaput nu tajwan a kar~…ĺisiw *** war~…ĺwar~…ĺ…ôn ku nibawan apakar~…ĺa ku ta-r~…ĺuw patiz…ôŇčaj, ujni a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad tat…ôŇč Ē~ °aj tu mit…ôka ku ta-r~…ĺow mikawawaj. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad atu **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad pasazuma mar~…ĺ…ôpun ku pipa ¶akajan atu pamuja a misar~…ĺisin, zikuz i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad nipatiz…ôŇčan nu ajzaaj a ŇčaŇčan, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ ta-r~…ĺuw i **** a mkińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺ…ôpun ku tukun, sipatiz…ôŇč tu pi ¶akajaj a kitizaan i **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad mibuńßat, sazikuzaj ta-r~…ĺuw mikawawaj i **** a mińß ¶aan ńßamin mar~…ĺ…ôpun zikuz ujni sazikuzaj a mińß ¶a mibuńßat **** ***
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Taypak 101 ŚŹįŚĆó101 Taypak 101 "kamu nu Ing, TAIPEI101" tini i Taywan Taypak kuwan sin-i kitizaan u satalakaway a luma', mala u angangan nu nipatinengan a luma' 508 a depah, 101 ku talakaw, 5 ku katadungduh nu sasaay, sipatizeng aca tu pipacakayan "TAIPEI101MALL". i 2004 a mihca 12 a bulad 31 a demiad miteka katukuh 2010 a mihca 1 a bulad 4 a demiad u CTBUH a nipatatengaan u saayaway talakaway a luma' nu kitakit, ŚŹįŚĆó101(ŤčĪŤ™ě:TAIPEI 101) "TAIPEI 101 MALL".śĖľ2004ŚĻī12śúą31 CTBUH nilaculan imahini u saayaway nu talakaway a luma' nu Taywan, atu uyni dada' satalakaway macaliway ku 500 depah, macaliway ku 100 katatungduh a nipatizeng a luma', caay ku saayaway a talakaway dada' nu kitakit macaliway ku pangkiw kung-li "pakala tu 0.3 ing-li ku nipatizeng, u saka11 nu satalakaway a nipatizeng nu kitakit. u nipatizeng atu misiwbay a sakaput u nu Taypak cin-lung a kusi. Taypak ŚŹįŚĆó101 a nisabalucu'an patizeng namakay 1990 a mihcaan malingatu pacakat, saayaway a ngangan "Taypak kanatal cin-lung a kitizaan" "kamu nu Ing Taipei World Financial Center han" han, apatatungus tu Cung-hwa-min-kow seybu micuzuhay tu Ya-tay pisiwbayan a kitizaan" milekakawa misabalucu' pasayza cin-lung-ye misanga' tu tabakiay a patiyamayay, ŚŹįŚĆó101 "(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Taipei World Financial Center), , zikuz paketun i Taypak kuwan sin-i sabalucu'an a kitizaan A22 atu A23 a kitizaan patizeng, tini satu i 1996 a mihca 10 a bulad pabalucu' u mahiniay NOT ku nipatizeng. 1997 a mihca 7 a bulad, Taypak kanatal cin-lunng kitizaan patizing i Cung-hwa milungan, hung-kuw patizegay u ci-ye ku mikeliday Taywan u kalisiw 206 walwalen 70 a mihcaan ku situngus tuyni a lala' zikuz, patizeng tu Taypak cin-lung a kusi mala u mikawaway a sakaput, i 1998 a mihca 1 bulad 13 a demiad tatenga'ay tu miteka mikawaw. katukuh 1999 a mihca 4 a bulad, u Lipun nu misiwbayay syung-ku kaput ku saayaway KTRT a sakaput nu Taywan a kalisiw 391 walwalen ku nibawan apakala ku ta-luw patizengay, uyni a mihca 7 a bulad tateng'ay tu miteka ku ta-low mikawaway. 2001 a mihca 6 a bulad atu 2003 a mihca 7 a bulad pasazuma malepun ku pipacakayan atu pamuya a misalisin, zikuz i 2002 a mihca 7 a bulad nipatizengan nu ayzaay a ngangan, kilul ta-luw i 2003 a mkihca 10 a bulad malepun ku tukun, sipatizeng tu picakayay a kitizaan i 2003 a mihca 11 a bulad mibuhat, sazikuzay ta-luw mikawaway i 2004 a mihcaan hamin malepun zikuz uyni sazikuzay a mihca mibuhat šł≠śĖáŚŹįŚĆó 101

pasajza ¶in-r~…ĺuŇč-j…ô misaŇča Ē~ ° tu tabakiaj a patijamajaj, ***** "(**:taip…ôi worr~…ĺd finan ¶iar~…ĺ ¶…ônt…ôr), , zikuz pak…ôtun i tajpak kuwan sin-i sabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an a kitizaan a** atu a** a kitizaan patiz…ôŇč, tini satu i **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° u mańßiniaj not ku nipatiz…ôŇč. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad, tajpak kanatar~…ĺ ¶in-r~…ĺunŇč kitizaan patiziŇč i ¶uŇč-ńßwa mir~…ĺuŇčan, ńßuŇč-kuw patiz…ôgaj u ¶i-j…ô ku mik…ôr~…ĺidaj tajwan u kar~…ĺisiw *** war~…ĺwar~…ĺ…ôn ** a mińß ¶aan ku situŇčus tujni a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° zikuz, patiz…ôŇč tu tajpak ¶in-r~…ĺuŇč a kusi mar~…ĺa u mikawawaj a sakaput, i **** a mińß ¶a * bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj tu mit…ôka mikawaw. katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad, u r~…ĺipun nu misiwbajaj sjuŇč-ku kaput ku saajawaj kt*t a sakaput nu tajwan a kar~…ĺisiw *** war~…ĺwar~…ĺ…ôn ku nibawan apakar~…ĺa ku ta-r~…ĺuw patiz…ôŇčaj, ujni a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad tat…ôŇč Ē~ °aj tu mit…ôka ku ta-r~…ĺow mikawawaj. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad atu **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad pasazuma mar~…ĺ…ôpun ku pipa ¶akajan atu pamuja a misar~…ĺisin, zikuz i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad nipatiz…ôŇčan nu ajzaaj a ŇčaŇčan, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ ta-r~…ĺuw i **** a mkińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺ…ôpun ku tukun, sipatiz…ôŇč tu pi ¶akajaj a kitizaan i **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad mibuńßat, sazikuzaj ta-r~…ĺuw mikawawaj i **** a mińß ¶aan ńßamin mar~…ĺ…ôpun zikuz ujni sazikuzaj a mińß ¶a mibuńßat **** ***
